channel.title: MindExtract
channel.description: MindExtract — download and transcribe video from anywhere

item.title: Version 1.3.1
item.description:
What's New in 1.3.1

  • Improved History view — Search by title or platform, date groups (Today / Yesterday / This Week / Older) with item counts, hover-to-reveal actions (re-download, copy URL, open folder, delete), and a Clear All button with confirmation
  • Redesigned language picker — Select transcription language from a clean scrollable list with checkmarks
  • Fixed stale transcription state — Starting a new transcription now correctly resets the previous result
